_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Plutonium T6
author: poitor@vxl.to
description: Plutonium is a community modification for Call of Duty: Black Ops II that provides dedicated server support, modding, and an enhanced multiplayer experience. This egg supports both Multiplayer (t6mp) and Zombies (t6zm) game modes. Requires a Steam account that owns Black Ops II to download game files.
startup: if [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "1" ]; then ./plutonium-updater -d plutonium; fi && cd plutonium && wine ./bin/plutonium-bootstrapper-win32.exe {{GAME_MODE}} "Z:\\home\\container\\game" -dedicated +set key {{SERVER_KEY}} +set fs_game {{MOD}} +set net_port {{SERVER_PORT}} +exec {{CONFIG_FILE}} +map_rotate

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Plutonium T6 Installation Script

## just in case someone removed the defaults.
if [ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user.\n"
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

## download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# SteamCMD fails otherwise for some reason, even running as root.
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## install game using steamcmd (Windows files for Wine)
mkdir -p /mnt/server/game
install_steam_app() {
    echo "Installing Steam App ID ${1}..."
    ./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server/game +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} $( [[ "${WINDOWS_INSTALL}" == "1" ]] && printf %s '+@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows' ) +app_update ${1} validate +quit
}

if [ "${GAME_MODE}" == "t6zm" ]; then
    install_steam_app ${T6ZM_APPID}
else
    install_steam_app ${T6MP_APPID}
fi

## set up 32 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

## set up 64 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

## Download plutonium-updater and Plutonium client files
cd /mnt/server
curl -sSL -o plutonium-updater.tar.gz https://github.com/mxve/plutonium-updater.rs/releases/latest/download/plutonium-updater-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
tar -xzf plutonium-updater.tar.gz
chmod +x plutonium-updater
rm -f plutonium-updater.tar.gz
./plutonium-updater -d plutonium

## Create default server configs if not present
mkdir -p game/main

if [ ! -f game/main/dedicated.cfg ]; then
cat > game/main/dedicated.cfg << 'DEDICFG'
//////////////////////////////////////////////////
// Plutonium T6 MP - Basic Server
//////////////////////////////////////////////////

set sv_hostname "Plutonium T6 Server"
set sv_motd "Powered by Pterodactyl"

set rcon_password "CHANGE_ME_RCON"
set g_password ""

set sv_maxclients 18
set sv_voice 1

set g_log "logs/games_mp.log"
set g_logSync 2

sv_maprotation "execgts tdm.cfg map mp_raid map mp_hijacked map mp_village map mp_express"
DEDICFG
fi

if [ ! -f game/main/dedicated_zm.cfg ]; then
cat > game/main/dedicated_zm.cfg << 'ZMDEDICFG'
//////////////////////////////////////////////////
// Plutonium T6 ZM - Basic Server
//////////////////////////////////////////////////

set sv_hostname "Plutonium T6 Server"
set rcon_password "CHANGE_ME_RCON"

set g_log "logs/games_zm.log"
set g_logSync 2

sv_maprotation "execgts zm_classic_transit.cfg map zm_transit"
ZMDEDICFG
fi

## install end
echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Server Key
variables.description: Your Plutonium server key from https://platform.plutonium.pw/serverkeys

variables.name: Game Mode
variables.description: Game mode to run. Use t6mp for Multiplayer or t6zm for Zombies.

variables.name: Config File
variables.description: Server configuration file to execute. Use dedicated.cfg for Multiplayer or dedicated_zm.cfg for Zombies.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Sets the server hostname displayed in the server browser.

variables.name: Mod Directory
variables.description: Optional mod directory path passed to fs_game (e.g. mods/my_mod). Leave empty for no mod.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Automatically update Plutonium client files on server start using plutonium-updater.

variables.name: Steam User
variables.description: This is a required setting and cannot be set to anonymous.

variables.name: Steam Auth
variables.description: Steam account auth code. Required if you have 2FA enabled.

variables.name: Multiplayer App ID
variables.description: Steam App ID for Call of Duty: Black Ops II Multiplayer (t6mp).

variables.name: Zombies App ID
variables.description: Steam App ID for Call of Duty: Black Ops II Zombies (t6zm).
